plan.pageDescription: This page is a demo of TodoMVC, a collection of Todo list applications built with different JavaScript frameworks and libraries. It includes a text input for creating new todos, and a list of todos that can be double-clicked to edit them. The page also includes links to the real TodoMVC website and the creator's Github profile.
testableActions: Verifying that todos are correctly displayed
Checking that double-clicking a todo opens the edit mode
Validating that the links to TodoMVC and the creator's profile work as expected

tests.title: TodoMVC Demo › Open edit mode on double-click
